## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Adds hyperdiffusion to grid-scale and subgrid-scale vertical velocity. Closes #1604 

## To-do

-->

- [x] Update ref counter and mse table

-->

title: Add hyperdiffusion to vertical velocity

This PR fixes a bug in the Earth Warp setup.

closes #1615
title: fix a bug in Earth Warp setup
